channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped sofa, 27th April
item.description:
Sofa left on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knatchbull Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large areas of water logged grass at Sidcup Place. The visible water is close to where water utilities work is taking place in the road by Christ The King college in Sidcup., 27th April
item.description:
Flooded grassy areas at Sidcup Place, close to the main Road, past the tennis courts in the direction of the hospital. Nearby water works currently taking place by Thames Water.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole / sinkhole in the middle of the road, 27th April
item.description:
There is a massive pothole / sinkhole in the middle of the road on the lane as you turn towards elephant and castle just before the lights. It has been getting bigger over the last few weeks but now is very big and deep and is causing traffic to swerve into the other lane to swerve it (obviously this is dangerous to all road traffic)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Lane, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dyne, 27th April
item.description:
Flighty fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Large pile of smashed glass, 27th April
item.description:
There is a large pile of smashed glass on William Booth Road, it's close to the entrance of a school and it's also close to the small field that is on William Booth Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, William Booth Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gulley still blocked and hasn’t been cleaned, 27th April
item.description:
Gulley and Road drain completely blocked with dirt, appears to have not been cleared during the ‘Bickley ward cyclical cleaning’ Please can this be addressed to prevent road floods
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pines Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caravan/trailers/car abandoned, 27th April
item.description:
There is a blue ford focus, a caravan, a trailer abandoned. They have been there for years and never moved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Tyrwhitt Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large panel and bags, 27th April
item.description:
Seems to be another Fly tipping episode

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balls Pond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Beginning to 47 Petersham Drive, 27th April
item.description:
Been there for months and are getting worse and worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree needs pruning damaging phone lines, 27th April
item.description:
Hi there, this tree needs pruning as is is affecting the phone lines to the flats and houses surrounding it. This has been an ongoing issue for over a year. The tree is situation at the end of the cul de sac on Perth Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Perth Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose paving tile, just outside employee entrance to Job Centre on Barnsbury Road, 27th April
item.description:
This loose paving stone is a trip hazard, it wobbles when stepped on, is misaligned with others, and sticks up causing pedestrians to stumble over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eckford Street, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Proper mopping please, 27th April
item.description:
It supposed to be washed 2x a week or when is dirty of spilled liquids , at present someone decided to urine on our stair over the weekend! Please disinfect!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter outside social club, 27th April
item.description:
Litter outside social club

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 27th April
item.description:
Bb

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Elizabeth Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping outside 106 Clarence Road, 27th April
item.description:
Fly Tipping outside 106 Clarence Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent fly tipping, 27th April
item.description:
Bags of rubbish, litter and furniture on corner of Dunlace road. There is actually litter all over the street. If the litter sweep man could come regularly that would be great. Thank you Hackney council!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned motorcycle, 27th April
item.description:
An abandoned motorcycle for about 2 months now. Location is the alleyway between house of Fades barbers and boutique of meat butchers (bellegrove road), drive up the alleyway (where blue arrow points, 3rd picture) motorcycle is there as you turn the bend up there. Any assistance would be immense, thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87a, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress left near bus stop on Barry road, 27th April
item.description:
Left overnight by Uoland Road bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bass Mews, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag and boxes dumped on Colomb St, 27th April
item.description:
A big bag and plastic boxes appear to be dumped on the pavement outside someone’s garage (on Colomb Street (but I think garage belongs 36 to Walnut Tree Rd).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walnut Tree Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clapton Passage Litter, 27th April
item.description:
Lots of litter spread along clapton passage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
